title: Pluto / StreamlinePro
subtitle: Multi-tenant booking platform — workflows between app, API, and integrations

packages.name: Expo App
packages.description: The same codebase ships to iOS, Android, and web via react-native-web.

packages.name: Stripe Connect
packages.description: Connected accounts for companies + workers; payouts.

packages.name: EAS Build
packages.description: Expo Application Services — native iOS/Android binaries.

packages.name: Web Bundle (CDN)
packages.description: Static export of the Expo app served by nginx.

flows.name: User login
flows.description: Mobile/web user authenticates against the Laravel API and receives a Sanctum token.

steps.label: POST /api/v1/auth/login
steps.note: Throttled to 30/min per IP at the route layer.

steps.label: SELECT user + roles
steps.note: PasswordAuditService also writes a hit/miss row for rate-limit + anomaly detection.

steps.label: 200 OK
steps.note: Mobile stores the token in AsyncStorage; subsequent requests carry it as Bearer.

flows.name: Invite new user
flows.description: Admin invites a teammate by email; a signed link bootstraps the new account.

steps.label: POST /api/v1/users (role=worker)
steps.note: Triggered from Settings → Team → Invite.

steps.label: INSERT users + role assignment
steps.payload: User{id, email, role, company_id, invite_token, password_set_at=null}

steps.label: Postmark API: send invitation
steps.note: Magic link: https://app/accept-invite?t=…

steps.label: 201 Created
steps.note: Mobile shows a success toast.

flows.name: Create a booking
flows.description: Dispatcher schedules a job; worker(s) are assigned, notified, and the customer is reachable for confirmations.

steps.label: Expo push to each assigned worker's device tokens

flows.name: Upload a job photo
flows.description: Worker on-site captures a before/after photo; it lands in S3 and is linked to the booking.

steps.label: POST /api/v1/bookings/upload-photo (multipart)
steps.note: expo-image-picker captures the photo; mobile encodes as multipart.

steps.label: putObject(bookings/{id}/photos/{uuid}.jpg)
steps.note: Stream straight from Laravel filesystem driver — no temp file on the API host.

flows.name: Stripe Connect onboarding
flows.description: Worker (or company owner) connects a Stripe account so they can receive payouts.

steps.label: POST /api/v1/stripe/onboarding/worker
steps.note: User taps 'Connect Stripe' on the Earnings screen.

steps.label: 200 OK
steps.note: Mobile opens the URL in an in-app browser (WebBrowser.openAuthSessionAsync).

steps.label: Webhook: account.updated
steps.note: Signature-verified by StripeWebhookController; flips status to 'verified' on charges_enabled=true.

flows.name: Customer review (token-gated)
flows.description: Customer receives a tokenized review link by email post-job; submits NPS + comment without logging in.

steps.label: Postmark: send 'How did we do?' email
steps.note: Triggered by BookingCompletedListener after booking.status=completed.

steps.label: customer clicks the signed link
steps.note: Opens https://app.streamlinepro.com/reviews/{token} in the browser.

steps.label: GET /api/v1/public/reviews/{token}
steps.note: Throttled 60/min per IP. Returns booking summary + form config.

flows.name: Native build — eas build
flows.description: Developer ships a new mobile binary to TestFlight + Play internal track.

steps.label: eas build --profile production --platform all
steps.note: Triggered locally or from CI. Reads eas.json + app.json.

steps.label: expo prebuild + native compile (iOS & Android)
steps.note: Runs on EAS-hosted macOS/Linux workers.

steps.label: submit IPA to App Store Connect + AAB to Play Console
steps.note: eas submit, gated on a successful build.

steps.label: TestFlight build available / Play internal release
steps.note: Testers + Сергей smoke-test before promoting to production.

flows.name: Web build — expo export → CDN
flows.description: Same Expo codebase exported as a static web bundle, deployed behind nginx.

steps.label: npm run build:web
steps.note: EXPO_UNSTABLE_TREE_SHAKING=true expo export -p web --output-dir dist

steps.label: rsync dist/ → /var/www/app (nginx)
steps.note: Deployed via deploy/install-stg-dev.sh; nginx serves the static bundle.

steps.label: EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL → /api/v1
steps.note: Web bundle calls the same API as native via CORS-allowed origin.
